description.value:
Trigger A creature enters the water

Effect The creature sinks underwater and must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:16] save. The trap then rolls initiative.

Failure The creature is pulled 5 feet down.

Critical Failure The creature is pulled 10 feet down.

stealth.details: (trained) (or –10 and no minimum proficiency if the surface is disturbed)

details.description: A pool of deep, foul water attempts to drown creatures that enter it.
details.disable: @Check[nature|dc:21] or @Check[religion|dc:21] and cast a 1st-rank or higher spell from the divine or primal traditions to cleanse the pool
details.routine:
(1 action) On its initiative, the Well of Roqorolos attempts to pull down each creature within it (as Drown). A creature in the well that is pulled under has to hold its breath to avoid drowning.

A creature in the water can attempt a @Check[athletics|dc:18] check to Swim 10 feet. On a critical failure, the creature sinks 5 feet. A creature that Swims out of the well escapes the hazard and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone] in a space adjacent to the pool. Other creatures can Aid the creature, typically by using a rope or similar aid, or attempt to pull the creature out with their own @Check[athletics|dc:18] check, with the same results as if the creature attempted the check.
